title: Lucky Pixelmon
description: This Mod use with Pixelmon Reforged for random Pokemon generation from Lucky Blocks and also a variety of Lucky Blocks, the Normal, Legendary and also the Fake Legendary.
body:
## Pixelmon Lucky Block Addon-Mod

This Mod use with Pixelmon Reforged for random Pokemon generation from LuckyBlocks and also a variety of LuckyBlocks, the Normal, Legendary and also the Fake Legendary.

Legendary hits have Special Effects.

### Lucky Block

Default Rates:

- Legendary - 1%
- Ultra Beast - 10%
- Legendary Lucky Block

Default Rates:

- Legendary - 100%
- Fake Legendary Lucky Block

Default Rates:

- Legendary - 30%
- Magikarp - 70%
### Poke Phone
- RMB to Heal actual party
- SHIFT + RMB to open PC
